name: hexwright
description: Engine-agnostic hex-map terrain/feature editor — zero-build, Canvas2D. Assign hex terrain, in-hex features, and multi-feature hexsides; export the canonical hexgrid/terrain/hexsides JSON your game consumes.
author: Ray Weiss

scripts.test: node verify/smoke.mjs && node verify/func-check.mjs && node verify/ui-check.mjs && node verify/help-check.mjs && node verify/wmp-check.mjs && node verify/autosave-check.mjs && node verify/edge-paint-check.mjs && node verify/terrain-paint-check.mjs && node verify/shift-snap-check.mjs && node verify/twu-check.mjs && node verify/blank-lattice-check.mjs && node verify/class-layer-load-check.mjs && node verify/hexsides-export-check.mjs && node verify/v2-terrain-fill-check.mjs && node verify/composite-terrain-render-check.mjs && node verify/gota-terrain-render-check.mjs && node verify/clear-layer-check.mjs && node verify/features-check.mjs && node verify/terrain-labels-check.mjs && node verify/names-check.mjs && node verify/inspector-viewport-check.mjs
